title: JUTA-064 My Best Friend's Mother I Got Horny When My Son's Friend Confessed... Kotomi Saeki
overview: I went to my best friend Takeshi's house to play. Wataru falls in love with the beautiful appearance of Takeshi's mother Kotomi at first sight, and his lewd fantasies with her become unstoppable. After that, I visit Takeshi's house for the purpose of Kotomi every time I have a chance. One day, by chance, Wataru is able to be alone with Kotomi, and he finally reveals his passion for her. Kotomi receives a young and passionate confession...
